rows.label: qev040903_MSG0001
rows.name:
Phew~ So this is the White Tree Continent-mo~!
I dozed off in the bag and arrived before I
knew it. It was super comfortable-mo~![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040903_MSG0002
rows.name:
Good work-mo! From here on,
it's Muimui's turn-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040903_MSG0004
rows.name:
Now, legendary sword! Come out-mo!
Hiding is useless-mo! As long as
I have this Legend-Radar...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040903_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask if the Legend-Radar is broken.

rows.label: qev040903_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask if he found the legendary sword right away.

rows.label: qev040903_MSG0006
rows.name:
It's... not broken... I think-mo! The
reaction is picking up perfectly-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040903_MSG0007
rows.name:
I found it-mo! It's nearby-mo.
But, to be precise...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040903_MSG0008
rows.name:
There are three reactions-mo!
It must be the influence of
this cold and the spores-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040903_MSG0009
rows.name:
But one of these three locations is
the right one-mo! We'll go around and
investigate them one by one-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040903_MSG0010
rows.name:
It's a harsh trial, but we'll
join hands, combine our
strength, and overcome it-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040903_MSG0011
rows.name:
Now, let's go-mo! To find
the legendary sword![ST:wait ]
